prompt: A funny photorealistic meme-style candid outdoor photo of three well-known tech CEOs standing close together in an awkward, emotionally loaded triangle. On the left foreground, Sam Altman is shown in a close-up three-quarter view, with dark curly hair, light skin, a dark crewneck shirt, and an exaggerated smug, pleased, slightly teary-eyed grin as he looks toward the man on the right. In the center background, Satya Nadella stands between them, bald with glasses, medium-brown skin, wearing a dark zip-up jacket, giving a calm, knowing, faintly amused smile while looking toward the man on the right. On the right foreground, Elon Musk is seen mostly from the back and side, with short dark hair and a black leather jacket, his face largely turned away from the camera. A large hand from the left person rests on the right person’s shoulder in the foreground, creating the comedic tension. Use a shallow depth of field, natural overcast daylight, soft realistic skin texture, and documentary-style photography. Add exactly 3 bold white meme labels with thick black outline placed near each person: Sam Altman at the lower left near the left man, Satya Nadella above the center man’s head, and Elon Musk at the lower right near the right man. Landscape composition, tight crop on faces and shoulder, realistic proportions, internet meme energy.
